_comment: REFERENCE DATA — publicly-documented STATE-CONTROLLED or STATE-AFFILIATED MEDIA domains. ORGANIZATIONS ONLY, never persons. Ships EMPTY and neutral: TruthLens bakes in no political judgments. Populate ONLY from auditable public sources (e.g. platform state-media labels, peer-reviewed datasets). Every entry MUST carry a `source` provenance URL so the list stays auditable. Matching a domain here is a CORRELATION lead for a human analyst — NEVER proof that any specific post is state-directed. Do not add individuals.

schema.domain: registrable domain, lowercase, no scheme/www (e.g. example.com)
schema.label: organization label as publicly documented (org, not a person)
schema.source: public provenance URL for this classification
